hero.label: Villas
hero.title: Private villas thoughtfully arranged across exclusive rows.
hero.text: Select Row T-01, T-02, or T-03 to explore the corresponding villas. Each residence features its own dedicated details page.

t01.title: Row T-01
t01.description: The first collection of villas, offering a peaceful setting and effortless accessibility.

t02.title: Row T-02
t02.description: The central villa row featuring a refined selection of premium residences.

t03.title: Row T-03
t03.description: An exclusive row showcasing a signature standalone villa.

villa01.name: Villa 01
villa01.shortDescription: Elegant villa featuring spacious interiors and a private courtyard.
villa01.description: Villa 01 offers a contemporary residential layout with a private courtyard and thoughtfully designed spaces tailored for modern family living.

villa02.name: Villa 02
villa02.shortDescription: Modern villa with a functional layout and enhanced privacy.
villa02.description: Villa 02 is designed for families seeking tranquility, privacy, and well-organized living spaces.

villa03.name: Villa 03
villa03.shortDescription: Premium villa with expansive interiors and a private courtyard.
villa03.description: Villa 03 blends contemporary architecture with a comfortable and functional layout designed for long-term living.

villa04.name: Villa 04
villa04.shortDescription: Premium villa with a privileged position and secluded outdoor spaces.
villa04.description: Villa 04 offers elevated privacy, abundant natural light, and spacious interiors ideal for family living.

villa05.name: Villa 05
villa05.shortDescription: Modern villa designed for comfortable family living.
villa05.description: Part of Row T-02, Villa 05 offers thoughtfully organized spaces, a private courtyard, and dedicated parking.

villa06.name: Villa 06
villa06.shortDescription: Villa with a private courtyard and a highly functional floor plan.
villa06.description: Villa 06 features a clear spatial organization, generous natural light, and privacy tailored for contemporary family living.

villa07.name: Villa 07
villa07.shortDescription: Premium villa with generous interiors and a private courtyard.
villa07.description: Villa 07 combines premium living standards with the comfort and elegance of a modern family residence.

villa08.name: Villa 08
villa08.shortDescription: Premium villa featuring expansive interiors and refined outdoor living.
villa08.description: Villa 08 is designed to deliver a balance of luxury, privacy, and contemporary comfort.

villa09.name: Villa 09
villa09.shortDescription: Distinctive villa offering exceptional privacy and a unique setting.
villa09.description: Located within Row T-03, Villa 09 is envisioned as the project’s most exclusive residence, featuring expansive living spaces, a private courtyard, and the potential for a private swimming pool.
